Clear package-owned cache content

Source: R/cache.R
bluertopo_cache_clear.Rd

Deletes only the configured bluertopo package cache after path safeguards.

Usage

bluertopo_cache_clear(
  cache_dir = bluertopo_cache_dir(),
  confirm = interactive()
)

Arguments

cache_dir

Length-one character path to a package-owned cache directory.

confirm

A length-one logical. Must be TRUE in noninteractive sessions.

Value

A one-row data frame with cache_dir, removed_files, and removed_bytes columns.

Examples

# \donttest{
bluertopo_cache_clear(confirm = TRUE)
#> <bluertopo_cache_clear>
#>   cache_dir: /tmp/RtmpbbL7qB/bluertopo-cache 
#>   removed_files: 11 
#>   removed_bytes: 16394846 
# }
